## Summary

Describe the change and why it was made.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Dashboard update
- [ ] Instrument config update
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing

- [ ] Ran the Streamlit dashboard
- [ ] Verified MT5 connection flow
- [ ] Checked journal/database behavior

## Notes

List any caveats, follow-up work, or areas reviewers should inspect closely.
